name: Armor of Agathys
description: A protective magical force surrounds you, manifesting as a spectral frost that covers you and your gear. You gain 5 Temporary Hit Points. If a creature hits you with a melee attack roll while you have these Hit Points, the creature takes 5 Cold damage. Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The Temporary Hit Points and the Cold damage both increase by 5 for each spell slot level above 1.
